description: 每日 6 条精选英文素材：权威资讯（IEEE Spectrum / MIT Tech Review / Nature 等）+ arXiv 论文摘要 + 行业博客 + 写作 tip。每条标注 CEFR 等级（A2/B1/B2/C1）和文体（学术/资讯/技术博客）。

items.title: Rhythm: Learning Interactive Whole-Body Control for Dual Humanoids (arXiv 2603.02856 v2)
items.en: Realizing interactive whole-body control for multi-humanoid systems is critical for unlocking complex collaborative capabilities in shared environments. Although recent advancements have significantly enhanced the agility of individual robots, bridging the gap to physically coupled multi-humanoid interaction remains challenging, primarily due to severe kinematic mismatches and complex contact dynamics. To address this, we introduce Rhythm, the first unified framework enabling real-world deployment of dual-humanoid systems for complex, physically plausible interactions. The framework integrates three core components: an Interaction-Aware Motion Retargeting (IAMR) module that generates feasible humanoid interaction references from human data, an Interaction-Guided Reinforcement Learning (IGRL) policy that masters coupled dynamics via graph-based rewards, and a real-world deployment system. Extensive experiments on physical Unitree G1 robots demonstrate successful transfer of diverse behaviors such as hugging and dancing from simulation to reality.

vocab.cn: 全身控制（不只是末端执行器）
物理耦合（两机器人有接触）
运动学不匹配（人和机器人关节差异）
动作重定向（人类→机器人映射）
基于图的奖励（节点是关节/接触）

items.cn: 继 Figure Helix-02 5/8 演示双人形铺床（无显式通信）后，Rhythm 给出第二条多人形协作技术路线：显式建模物理接触 + 用图奖励学习耦合动力学。三大组件分别解决「人类双人数据→机器人双人参考」「双策略协调学习」「真机 sim-to-real」。在两台 Unitree G1 上完成拥抱、跳舞、推/拉手等 8 类高接触式协作。读这篇能理解 2026 年「分布式协作（Helix-02）vs 接触式协作（Rhythm）」的两套路线分野。

items.title: Genesis AI unveils GENE-26.5, the first robotic brain to enable human-level physical manipulation (TechCrunch)
items.en: Genesis AI, the Khosla-backed startup that raised a record $105 million seed round, has gone full stack with GENE-26.5 — its first robotic foundation model — paired with a self-developed 20-DoF dexterous hand built in partnership with Wuji Tech. In demo footage, the system autonomously cracks eggs, slices tomatoes, makes smoothies, threads pipettes, untangles wire harnesses, plays piano, and solves a Rubik's cube — all at 1× real time using a single model, hardware platform, data strategy, and control stack. Co-founder Xian Zhou, the original creator of the open-source Genesis physics engine, told TechCrunch that the team "realized doing the model alone wouldn't cut it — we had to own the hardware. So we went full stack." The proprietary control middleware reportedly slashes 15-cm circular trajectory tracking error from ~20mm to ~2mm and end-to-end latency from ~80ms to as low as 3ms.

vocab.cn: 基础模型 / 通用底座大模型
灵巧的（手部精细操作能力）
跟踪误差（控制系统精度指标）
中间件（连接模型和硬件的软件层）
不够 / 行不通（口语表达）

items.cn: Genesis AI 在 2025 年 7 月以 1.05 亿美元种子轮（硅谷具身智能赛道纪录）亮相，5 月 6 日发布首个全栈机器人基础模型 GENE-26.5。关键看点：①一个模型 + 一套硬件 + 一套数据策略，1× 真实速度完成「打蛋、切番茄、做奶昔、移液、整理线束、弹钢琴、解魔方」7 类家务级灵巧操作；②自研 20 自由度灵巧手 Genesis Hand 1.0；③控制中间件把端到端延迟从 80ms 砍到 3ms。创始人周衔（原 Genesis 物理引擎作者）原话「只做模型不行，必须掌握硬件，所以我们走全栈路线」是 2026 年具身智能赛道一句标志性宣言。

items.title: Who Owns the Humanoid Stack? (IEEE Spectrum)
items.en: The humanoid-robot market in 2025-26 is being shaped less by a single technical breakthrough than by strategic choices: who owns the stack, which hardware tradeoffs are prioritized, and how open the software and developer ecosystems will be. Companies taking divergent paths — Tesla's end-to-end silicon and vision-AI play, Figure AI's data-centric enterprise fleet approach, Apptronik's compliant-actuator and certification focus, and Unitree/1X's cost-led hardware strategies — are crystallizing distinct value propositions for customers in logistics, manufacturing, retail and field inspection.

vocab.cn: 与其说是 X 决定的不如说是 Y（高级对比句式）
正在结晶（这里指逐渐成形）

items.cn: IEEE Spectrum 是机器人 / 电子工程领域最权威的英文行业刊物，行文风格偏 C1（高级英语）。这段把 2025-26 人形机器人市场拆成 4 大流派（Tesla / Figure / Apptronik / Unitree+1X），用 "shaped less by A than by B" 这种典型对比句式。读熟这段，你的英文 industry analysis 写作直接上一个台阶。

items.title: OA-WAM: Object-Addressable World Action Model
items.en: World Action Models (WAMs) enhance VLA policies by jointly predicting scene evolution and robot actions, but most existing methods represent the predicted world as holistic images or global latents — making it hard for the action decoder to address a specific target object. We propose OA-WAM, which decomposes each frame into N+1 slot states. Each slot maintains a persistent address vector and a time-varying content vector, separating object identity from appearance.

vocab.cn: World Action Model 世界动作模型
整体的；这里指未分解的、混合表示
槽（位）；这里指 object-centric 表示中的一个物体单元
外观；与 identity 对立的概念

items.cn: arXiv abstract 的标准结构：[Context: WAMs 已有的但...] + [Gap: holistic 表示有问题] + [Method: We propose X, which Y] + [Insight: 把 identity 和 appearance 解耦]。读 1000 篇 abstract 你就能写 abstract 了。

items.title: NVIDIA on Generalist-Specialist Robots
items.en: The next generation of robots will be generalist-specialists — capable of understanding instructions, learning general skills, and being trained for specific tasks. Building such robots requires an integrated workflow from cloud to robot, ensuring that data collection and generation, training and evaluation of control policies, and safe deployment to physical devices all flow seamlessly. These generalist-specialist systems rely on Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models for intelligent perception, understanding, and execution of diverse tasks. To accelerate this transformation, the NVIDIA Isaac open platform provides robot developers with a complete toolchain — including models, data pipelines, simulation frameworks, and runtime libraries — built around NVIDIA's three-computer solution.

vocab.cn: 通才-专才（既能广博又能专精）

items.cn: NVIDIA 官方博客的写法是 "产品 marketing + 工程语言" 的标准范本——长句但结构清晰，每句都有具体名词支撑。学这种英文你能学会怎么写自己 GitHub README 的 "motivation" 段。重点：generalist-specialist 是 NVIDIA 推动的术语，2026 年开始进入主流。

items.title: Latent Bridge: Feature Delta for Dual-System VLA
items.en: Dual-system VLAs such as GR00T-N1.6 and π0.5 invoke a heavy VLM backbone at every control step, creating a serious latency bottleneck. We observe that VLM features at adjacent steps are highly redundant. Latent Bridge introduces a lightweight delta predictor that estimates the feature change between consecutive steps, allowing the VLM to be invoked only periodically. Across LIBERO, RoboCasa and ALOHA, we cut VLM calls by 50–75% while preserving 95–100% of task success.

vocab.cn: 双系统（VLM 大脑 + 动作头）
增量、差分；希腊字母 Δ

items.cn: VLA 推理瓶颈不是「算得慢」，而是「每步都重复算」。Latent Bridge 用轻量 delta predictor 减少 VLM 调用 50-75%，性能几乎不掉。学习重点：cut X by Y% while preserving Z% 这种主张句式是写 paper 必备。

物理耦合（两机器人有接触）
运动学不匹配（人和机器人关节差异）
动作重定向（人类→机器人映射）
基于图的奖励（节点是关节/接触）

archive.title: Hedging Words: Reading Between the Lines
archive.source: Academic English · 模块第 02 节
archive.en: ML papers are full of hedging — soft phrases that avoid strong commitment. "We hypothesize that X enables Y" really means "we guessed and tried". "Empirically, X seems to work" means "the experiments worked but we don't fully understand why". When you read, recognize hedging so you don't overestimate claims. When you write, hedge appropriately to avoid being attacked by reviewers — but don't hedge so much that your contribution sounds unimpressive.

vocab.cn: 弱断言、不下死结论的措辞

archive.cn: 读 paper：识别 hedging 词（we hypothesize / empirically / it seems）能避免被作者忽悠。写 paper：自己也要适度 hedge — 完全不 hedge 会被 reviewer 抓硬伤；hedge 太多 contribution 听起来又虚。

archive.title: MIT Tech Review: Hidden Human Labor Behind Humanoid Robot Demos
archive.en: The emerging humanoid robot industry is far more dependent on hidden human labor than glossy demos suggest, according to a new MIT Technology Review investigation. The report describes how robots that appear autonomous onstage or in marketing videos are frequently steered in real time by remote human operators, while others depend on large, low-wage workforces to collect the training data they need. This scrutiny comes just as firms such as 1X Technologies and Tesla race to commercialize humanoids for homes and factories, buoyed by billions of dollars in investment and claims that the machines can perform everyday tasks with little human help.

vocab.cn: 精美包装过的演示视频

archive.cn: MIT Technology Review 调查揭示：很多看起来「自主」的人形机器人 demo 实际上由远程操作员实时控制，训练数据也由大量低薪数据工人采集。本文是英文行业新闻的标准范文——句式 emerging X is more dependent on Y than Z suggests / according to a new investigation / This scrutiny comes just as ... 都值得反复读。

archive.title: OA-WAM: Object-Addressable World Action Model
archive.en: World Action Models (WAMs) enhance VLA policies by jointly predicting scene evolution and robot actions, but most existing methods represent the predicted world as holistic images or global latents — making it hard for the action decoder to address a specific target object. We propose OA-WAM, which decomposes each frame into N+1 slot states. Each slot maintains a persistent address vector and a time-varying content vector, separating object identity from appearance.

vocab.cn: World Action Model 世界动作模型
整体的；这里指未分解的、混合表示
槽（位）；这里指 object-centric 表示中的一个物体单元
外观；与 identity 对立的概念

archive.cn: arXiv abstract 的标准结构：[Context: WAMs 已有的但...] + [Gap: holistic 表示有问题] + [Method: We propose X, which Y] + [Insight: 把 identity 和 appearance 解耦]。读 1000 篇 abstract 你就能写 abstract 了。

archive.title: Latent Bridge: Feature Delta for Dual-System VLA
archive.en: Dual-system VLAs such as GR00T-N1.6 and π0.5 invoke a heavy VLM backbone at every control step, creating a serious latency bottleneck. We observe that VLM features at adjacent steps are highly redundant. Latent Bridge introduces a lightweight delta predictor that estimates the feature change between consecutive steps, allowing the VLM to be invoked only periodically. Across LIBERO, RoboCasa and ALOHA, we cut VLM calls by 50–75% while preserving 95–100% of task success.

增量、差分；希腊字母 Δ

archive.cn: VLA 推理瓶颈不是「算得慢」，而是「每步都重复算」。Latent Bridge 用轻量 delta predictor 减少 VLM 调用 50-75%，性能几乎不掉。学习重点：cut X by Y% while preserving Z% 这种主张句式是写 paper 必备。
